extraction.one_line_summary: PINO Thibaut won Stage 7 to Malbun from the breakaway while IGITA Sergio attacked with 2km to go, gaining enough time to take yellow by 2 seconds over THOMAS Geraint.
tactical_patterns: IGITA attacked at 2km despite being 10s down on GC, forcing FULSON to chase while THOMAS marked, revealing offensive strategy from deficit position.
19-rider breakaway formed after 50km first hour on Lukmanier Pass, suggesting early selection on opening climb neutralized peloton's control ambitions.
THOMAS attacked FULSON in final 500m rather than collaborate, indicating confidence in TT ability to overcome 2-second deficit next day.

rider_signals.IGITA Sergio: positive: Took yellow with audacious 2km attack while starting 10s down, showing willingness to gamble before TT weakness exposed
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Attacked rival FULSON in finale despite both needing to minimize losses to IGITA, prioritizing TT starting position over collaboration
rider_signals.FULSON Jakob: negative: Forced to chase IGITA's move while THOMAS sat on, losing yellow and 17 seconds to both GC rivals through tactical isolation
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Daniel: neutral: INEOS had MARTINEZ set tempo before IGITA's attack, suggesting team recognized THOMAS needed better GC position pre-TT
rider_signals.PINO Thibaut: positive: Second win in three months after three-year drought, suggesting resurging form pattern worth monitoring
